raw_consumer_statement:
Best Buy is claiming I purchase equipment ( Tiller as such ) on XX/XX/XXXX in the amount of {$560.00} from XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. The agent from Best Buy called me on XXXX to ask about the changes as they were higher than anything I had ever used the card for. And the fact that the card had been paid off since XX/XX/XXXX. I asked for the card to be cancelled. And the agent said they would and that they would be sending me a new card. 

Shortly after that, they came back and said the charges were my responsibility. I then called the again on XX/XX/XXXX and said that this was fraud. I did not make the purchase. Today, XX/XX/XXXX they came back with a list of tools that they calm I purchased and were delivered to me. 

I am XXXX XXXX XXXX. What would I do with a tiller? They said it was delivered, but have not provided anything that proves the delivery.
